name: Custard Cups with Strega
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs with the sugar and vanilla until frothy and lemon-colored.
2. Add the lemon zest and continue beating.
3. Gradually add the milk, whisking constantly.
4. Prepare caramel by boiling half a cup of sugar with water in a separate saucepan.
5. Pour the caramel into custard cups.
6. Carefully pour the egg-and-milk mixture into the custard cups placed in a larger pan filled with enough water to reach halfway up the sides of the cups.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove from heat and unmold. Serve with Strega liqueur.
